name: JR's Christmas Adventure
short_description: Join Jessica in this humorous holiday FMV adventure. With 9 unique endings to discover, will you find joy or chaos?
detailed_description:
"JR’s Christmas Adventure: A Holiday Conspiracy Unfolds!"

Join Jessica on her unpredictable journey as she volunteers at her favorite holiday charity, only to be entangled in a web of intrigue and deception. Your choices will shape the outcome of her story, leading you down paths filled with laughter, drama, and unexpected twists.

Will Jessica make it home safely? Will she trust the wrong people or uncover hidden truths? Will she finally get that warm drink she's been craving?

As you navigate this interactive fiction adventure, you will discover secrets, meet quirky characters, and unravel a conspiracy that will keep you guessing until the end. But be warned: not everyone is as they seem, including Saint Nick himself...

Features:

  • 9 unique endings to uncover

  • Multiple paths to choose from, shaping Jessica's story

  • Quirky characters and secrets

Join the holiday hijinks in "JR’s Christmas Adventure" for free!

Thank you for visiting my page!

This product is unpolished and has rough edges, but if you can look past that, there is fun to be found. It was completed in five rushed weeks by a single passionate gamer who pretends to be a dev. They were learning new AI tools and made a lot of mistakes. They promise to learn from their mistakes, and they appreciate your forgiveness for any foolishness that transpires.
